title: Fit test - Failing the fit test
scenario: Fit Test shows yellow "Fail" icon for earbuds placed on table or incorrectly positioned, with Retry and Cancel buttons on Voyager Free 60/60+ and Free 20
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Connect to a Poly Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20 true wireless earbuds device.
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
Place both earbuds correctly in ears with proper seal.
Tap 'Start Fit Test' or equivalent button.
Observe the fit test results for each earbud.
Remove one earbud and place it on a table (simulating a failed fit).
Remove both earbuds and place them on a table (simulating both failing).
Observe the fit test results and the message displayed.
Tap 'Cancel' button on the fit test result screen.
Tap 'Retry' button on the fit test result screen.
expected: - Passing earbuds show a green icon with a "Good" tag. - Failing earbuds show a yellow icon with a "Fail" tag. - When one or both earbuds fail, the message "It looks like one or both earbuds need to be adjusted or try different size ear tip." is displayed. - "Cancel" and "Retry" buttons are visible on the result screen. - Tapping "Cancel" returns the user to the Device Home Screen or Onboarding screen. - Tapping "Retry" restarts the fit test.
